Home Insights Learn Servers Services
Home Insights Learn Servers Services

MCP Server Directory

Browse 164+ MCP servers that connect AI to your tools, data, and workflows. Each link takes you to the official documentation or repository for that integration.

MCP Server of the Week

Fibery

Business Tools Official

Fibery is a connected workspace that adapts to your team. Their official MCP server lets AI agents query entities, manage work items, and interact with custom databases — making it easy to build AI-powered workflows on top of your existing Fibery setup.

Entities Queries Databases Workflows Documents
View integration (opens in a new tab) →
Showing 164 of 164 servers

Custom Integrations

Don't see what you need?

Crox builds custom MCP servers tailored to your specific tools and workflows. Whether it's a proprietary system, legacy database, or niche SaaS platform, we can create connectors that let Claude integrate with your entire tech stack.

Explore Custom Builds Schedule a Call (opens in a new tab)
